---
title: ""
description: ""
listing:
  contents: blog
  id: blog_list
  type: grid               # cartes
  sort: "date desc"
  page-size: 9
  categories: false
  filter-ui: true          # champ de recherche
  sort-ui: [date, title]   # menu de tri
  fields: [image, title, date]
format:
  html:
    page-layout: article
    toc: false
---

::: {#blog_list}
:::
